tools.name: key.keyBind
tools.description:
Update Authentiq ID by replacing the object.

v4: `JWT(sub,email,phone)` to bind email/phone hash; 

v5: POST issuer-signed email & phone scopes
and PUT to update registration `JWT(sub, pk, devtoken, ...)`

See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples

tools.name: key.keyRegister
tools.description:
Register a new ID `JWT(sub, devtoken)`

v5: `JWT(sub, pk, devtoken, ...)`

See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples

tools.name: key.keyRetrieve
tools.description: Get public details of an Authentiq ID.

tools.name: key.keyRevoke
tools.description: Revoke an Identity (Key) with a revocation secret

tools.name: key.keyRevokeNosecret
tools.description:
Revoke an Authentiq ID using email & phone.

If called with `email` and `phone` only, a verification code 
will be sent by email. Do a second call adding `code` to 
complete the revocation.

tools.name: key.keyUpdate
tools.description:
update properties of an Authentiq ID.
(not operational in v4; use PUT for now)

v5: POST issuer-signed email & phone scopes in
a self-signed JWT

See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples

tools.name: scope.signRetrieve
tools.description: get the status / current content of a verification job

tools.name: scope.signRetrieveHead
tools.description: HEAD to get the status of a verification job

tools.name: scope.signUpdate
tools.description:
authority updates a JWT with its signature
See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
